# Laurent Vincentelli

Digital & AI Platforms Lead and Refounder. I have 15+ years of experience in building and scaling the platform layer that sits between raw compute and the people who need to use it.

## Current Roles
- Engagement Manager at Deloitte (2023 - Present) - Leading Digital & AI Platform engagements (FSI, Telco).
- Refounder at Minsys (2026 - Present) - Venture Building Micro-PE firm.
- Founding Partner at WorkshopThinking LLP (2020 - Present) - Digital & AI workshops for Main Street Business Leaders.

## Past Entrepreneurial Ventures
- Five Forces LLP - Founding Partner, LP (2019 - Present)
- Turbulences Engineering LLC - Co-Founder (2016 - 2018)
- Zeste LTS Systems LTD - Co-Founder (2014 - 2018)
- CloudLifters SARL - Founder (2011 - 2015) - Exited (M&A, 7x EBITDA)
- minsys.io - Founder (2010)

## Expertise
- Digital & AI Platform as a Product
- Extended Enterprise & Ecosystem Management
- Hybrid & Distributed Cloud (XaaS)
- Software Engineering Practices (DevSecOps, SRE, FinOps)
